violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (hand slicer and kitchen utensils) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC moved to ware washing area. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

(Cooked chicken and Beef) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

(Shrimp) was observed thawing in water in 3 bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Working containers of (dry ingredients and spices ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

(Cooked rice ) were observed stored on the floor in the (kitchen under stove ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed and moved rice to food prep area to finishing preparing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
Knives observed between stored in between prep units. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: -stove hoods -hot hold units -rice cookers -3 bay sink -bakers rack -can opener base -prep table and food storage shelves Non food contact areas must be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Ice machine is in poor repair. Observed a leak. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen and servers area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Scrub pads were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and hand slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC moved to ware washing area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

(Various food product ) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (rice) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed moved rice to sheet pans to continue proper cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
ROP fish was observed thawing in prep station with package still intact. PIC informed and product voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler, walk in freezer, and back storage area). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Boneless cooked chicken was observed being stored(cooling) under dishwashing unit. PIC moved to prep table for proper cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Ladle spoon was observed stored stored in between prep units. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Inspector observed single use tofu containers being used to store food product. PIC informed to cease practice. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: -stove hoods -all refrigeration units -hot hold units -bakers rack -all sinks -food storage bins -food storage shelves -can opener base Non food contact areas must be keep clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Ice machine and 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Observed leak. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (kitchen) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen and servers area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The (wall ) in the (back storage and sushi ) area is in poor repair. Observed a hole and chipped paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Tofu containers, towels, plastic bags were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024
Raw chicken was observed being stored near ware washing area. PIC removed to food prep area. Warewashing area to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of (dry ingredients ). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
Inspector observed single use tofu containers being used for food storage. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep units) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
The water heater and handsink in the kitchen area observed in poor repair. Leak observed at pipes under the sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024
The (wall) in the (back kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed holes in wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024
